raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee Leel-Kungi
firdehs / ka es ar tewim eſmu
unnajs / un pee tewim nahk/
n uhs tewi ſakka : Stabſti
nuns jelle/ ko eſſi tu ar to
ehninu runnajs/ ne aptlep to
reekſch mums/ tad ne gribbain
nehs tewi nokaut/ un ko irr tas
ehninſch us tewin runnajs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew us teem
azziht: Es patrittu luhg dams
reekſch ta Kehnixa/ ka tas man-
i ne liktu Jonatana Namma
vest/ tur nomirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiſſi Leel-Kungi
ee Jeremijus nahze/ un wiſſu
atzaja/ tad stabſtija wiſch teem
chz wiſſeem ſcheem Wahrdeem/
o tas Kehninſch bij pawehlejs.
In tee atſtahje no winna/ jo ta
eeta ne tappe dſirdeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jeremijus palikke Zec-
uma Pagalma lihds tai Deenat/
ad Jeruſaleme tappe uhsſeinta/
n wiſch bija wehl (tur/) kad
Jeruſaleme jaw bija uhsſeinta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ninsch no Babeles/ un wiſſ witz-
na Karrq-Spehks prett Jerusa-
lemi/ un apmettehs ap winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weenpadeſinita Gadda
Zedeſtius/ zettortd Mehneſi/ de-
wita Deena tahs Mehnes/ eelqu-
sahs tee Pilsfahta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Leeli-Kungi ta
Kehnixa no Babeles eegahje eeſ-
cha / un turrejahs pee tahm
widdejahm Wahrtim / prohti
NergalSarEzers / Samgar
Nebo / Sar Sekims to Kam-
bar Junkun Wirfneeks/ Nergal
Sar Eezers ta Lehgera Wirf-
neeks/ un wiſſi zitti Leel-Kungi
ta Kehnixa no Babeles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notiffahs/ kad Ze-
dekius tas Kehninſch no Ju-
da/ un wiſſi Karrq-Wihri tohs
redſeja/ tad behdse tee/ un tsgah-
je Nakti no ta Pilsfahta ahra
us to Zeltu pee Kehnixa Dahr-
sa/ zaur tahm Wahrtim starp
teem diweem Muhreem/ un
wiſch gabje zaur to Klatjuma
Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet to Kaldeern Spehks
dsinnahs wiŋkeem pakat/ un
panahze Zedekiju eeſch Jerkus
Klatjumeem/ un faxehme to/ un
wedde to augſcham pee Nebu-
kadnezara ta Kehnixa no Ba-
beles uhs Riblatu/ eeſch Eema-
ta Seimmes/ un tas noneſte pahr
winnu to Teesu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninſch no Ba-
beles nokawe tohs Behrnus Ze-
dekius eeſch Riblatas preekſch
winna Azzin / ir wiſſus Zeent-
gus
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
